text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back home from an outing, Silence
Suzuka suddenly stops in her tracks.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, it's just...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I follow her line of sight to find an arcade.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just inside sits a claw machine filled with an
assortment of snow globes.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I was just thinking how pretty those are.
choice_data_list: Do you want to go take a look?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If it's okay with you...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Then I'd love to. Just a quick little detour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head inside and make our way directly to the
claw machine.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm supposed to press this button to move
the claw, right?
choice_data_list: Are you sure you've got this?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm fine. You don't have to worry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or so she says.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Don't do that! Why's it going there?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The claw arm slowly extends downward and
scoops up a great big bunch of nothing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Can I go get some more coins? I want to try just a
few more times...
choice_data_list: You must really want one of those, huh?
You must really want one of those, huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. A miniature field of sparkling white snow...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I can imagine how pretty it would look sitting in
my room...
choice_data_list: Mind if I give it a go?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I can imagine how pretty it would look sitting in
my room...
choice_data_list: Mind if I give it a go?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you. That globe will be mine...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, right... Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Could you give me some advice? Like you do
before a race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka seems determined to get a snow
globe, so I give her some tips.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay... So, first... carefully, over the top...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Then watch from the side as—oh!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It fell... Okay, one more time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And another, and another, and another. She
keeps trying until, finally...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The claw carries a snow globe to the collection
tray and drops it in!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I did!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This beautiful snowy landscape is mine to view
whenever I want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka looks very pleased with herself as
she carries her new snow globe home.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Could it be that you want one too?
choice_data_list: If I manage to get one, you can have it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Really? Oh, please try then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I trade spots with Silence Suzuka and take the
controls.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Careful... Careful...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh! You grabbed one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thump!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Y-you did it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Can I really have it?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Because if you were to change your mind later,
I'm not sure I'd be able to let it go...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: For me...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Now, I wonder where I should put it in
my room...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: When I've decided, you'll be the first to know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka seems to be in a good mood as
she carries her new snow globe home.
